ddls:
CREATE TABLE "admins" (
  "admin_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each admin */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Full name of the admin */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the admin */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the admin account */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the admin */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the admin (e.g., super admin, regular admin) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last admin login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the admin account (active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "userid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user registered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("userid")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_details" (
  "acc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "userid" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID for the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., successful, pending, failed) */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("acc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_details_userid FOREIGN KEY ("userid") REFERENCES users ("userid")
)

CREATE TABLE "new_books" (
  "nbid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each new book */,
  "book_title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the book */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the book */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN of the book */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the book */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the book */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the book */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the book */,
  "reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the book */,
  "cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the book's cover image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nbid")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_categories" (
  "catid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("catid")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_inventory" (
  "bookid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "nbid" INTEGER /* ID of the new book */,
  "catid" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the book in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Inventory level at which a reorder is needed */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory was last updated */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bookid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_inventory_catid FOREIGN KEY ("catid") REFERENCES book_categories ("catid")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "orderid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "userid" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the order */,
  "bookid" INTEGER /* ID of the book being ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("orderid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_userid FOREIGN KEY ("userid") REFERENCES users ("userid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_bookid FOREIGN KEY ("bookid") REFERENCES book_inventory ("bookid")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "orderitemid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "orderid" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "bookid" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the book in the order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the book at the time of purchase */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the book */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("orderitemid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_orderid FOREIGN KEY ("orderid") REFERENCES orders ("orderid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_bookid FOREIGN KEY ("bookid") REFERENCES book_inventory ("bookid")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "paymentid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "orderid" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID for the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., successful, pending, failed) */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paymentid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_orderid FOREIGN KEY ("orderid") REFERENCES orders ("orderid")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activityid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "userid" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, order) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activityid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_userid FOREIGN KEY ("userid") REFERENCES users ("userid")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_activity" (
  "admin_activityid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "admin_id" TEXT /* ID of the admin */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., add user, delete user) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the admin */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_activityid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admin_activity_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES admins ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "roleid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "userid" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roleid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_userid FOREIGN KEY ("userid") REFERENCES users ("userid")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "permissionid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "roleid" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view orders, manage users) */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permissionid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_roleid FOREIGN KEY ("roleid") REFERENCES roles ("roleid")
)
